overview: ÆSTRALTØ is an isometric tile-based tactics RPG with vampire/cosmic aesthetics. Players explore procedurally generated maps, battle enemies in turn-based tactical combat, and manage three persistent characters through a deep progression system.
features: Enemy Register bestiary with all monsters and bosses
Stronger magnetic UI panels that never overlap
Shadow sizes reduced by 50%+ so they never exceed tile boundaries
Doka coins centered on tiles like portals
Cloud animation removed for better performance
Block depth sort fixed using full 2D coordinate check
Unified void tile + block walkability validation with flood-fill
Modular draggable UI panels with top-bar snap
